headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day sales are live with discounts on tech. Find deals on portable speakers and solar lights. Upgrade your gadgets for summer at reduced prices.

headline: On Trails is a wandering tale that blends hiking, science, and history
summary: New book 'On Trails' explores the joy of hiking. It weaves together elements of science and history. A captivating read for nature enthusiasts.

headline: Apple's latest MacBook Air is $200 off in both sizes for Memorial Day
summary: Apple's latest MacBook Air is $200 off for Memorial Day. Both 13-inch and 15-inch models are on sale. Get a powerful M5 MacBook Air deal now.

headline: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot 'personalities'
summary: Hackers are now targeting unique chatbot 'personalities.' They exploit AI's conversational traits for new attacks. This marks an evolution from simpler AI hacking methods.

headline: Rick and Morty Season 9 Premiere Review: "There's Something About Morty"
summary: Rick and Morty Season 9 opens with a fun, action-heavy premiere. The episode is bombastic and engaging. However, one key character feels mishandled.

headline: Nicolas Cage Says Christopher Nolan Won't 'Call Me Back' After Turning Down Insomnia Role
summary: Nicolas Cage claims Christopher Nolan won't contact him. This follows Cage declining a role in Nolan's film 'Insomnia.' Cage listed Nolan as a director who 'don't call me back.'

headline: Sebastian Stan Reveals He Plays "Many Roles" in The Batman: Part II
summary: Sebastian Stan hints at multiple roles in 'The Batman: Part II.' This suggests his character, Harvey Dent, will transform into Two-Face. Stan made the ambiguous announcement at Cannes.

headline: Idris Elba Says He Was Never in the Race to Play James Bond for New 007 Movie
summary: Idris Elba dismisses rumors of playing James Bond. He states he was never a candidate for the 007 role. Elba was not in consideration for the new Bond film.

headline: The questions raised by the Murrell embezzlement controversy
summary: The Murrell embezzlement controversy continues to raise questions. The case has shadowed the SNP for five years. A police investigation into the matter remains ongoing.

headline: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
summary: Iran states a deal with the US is not imminent. This contradicts earlier optimism from the US Secretary of State. Blinken suggested an agreement could be reached on Monday.

headline: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
summary: Oil prices have dropped due to hopes of a US-Iran peace deal. Speculation about an agreement has influenced market stability. Trump previously mentioned reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Greek swimmer only athlete to beat world record at controversial Enhanced Games
summary: Greek swimmer Kristian Gkolomeev broke a world record. He achieved this feat at the controversial Enhanced Games in Las Vegas. Gkolomeev was the sole record-breaker at the event.
